case_title: JAMES HIGHTREE VS. TIMELINE LOGISTICS INC., et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HIGHTREE, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT TIMELINE LOGISTICS INC., A TEXAS CORPORATION TIMELINE DELIVERIES, INC., A TEXAS CORPORATION DBA TIMELINE LOGISTICS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
